title: Command Bot Card Deck
summary: Compressed Bots-stage command cards with smaller summary chips, portraits, stat tiles, hidden long ask/thread copy, and wider command buttons for faster command-room scanning.
proof: Added tested Bots-stage card rules that tighten summary chips, avatar rows, lane rows, and stat tiles.
Hid long ask and thread copy only inside the Bots command room so command cards fit more controls above the fold.
Updated README, cache markers, snapshot generation, and regression floors so the standalone dashboard records the compact bot-card unlock.
